message:
🐛 Add card reorder verification to drag-and-drop test (#10572)

Fixes #10539

The test only asserted body was visible after drag — never verified
cards were reordered. Added before/after order capture and assertion
to catch broken drag implementations.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
